nodes.label: P2.5 synth — GD-between-blocks read vs write cadence sweep (marginal, negative gap)
nodes.rationale: read declines gently 0.923->0.907 as N grows and never clears the pure-SCFF (N=1) baseline of 0.923; write declines faster to 0.890. Title reports read 'closes -10%' of the pure-SCFF-to-GD gap here -- unlike CIFAR, synth's pure-SCFF is already close to the GD ceiling (0.963), leaving little headroom for the recipe to gain.
